typeuses.zincconcentrate: Refined through leaching with acid to remove impurities, ready for further metallurgical processing
typeuses.goldconcentrate: Extracted using advanced chemical methods to isolate gold particles from other minerals and metals
typeuses.tinconcentrate: Obtained through flotation techniques to separate valuable tin minerals from gangue
typeuses.copperconcentrate: Produced by flotation to remove unwanted minerals and impurities
typeuses.leadconcentrate: Processed through flotation to separate lead from silver and other valuable components
typeuses.ironconcentrate: Purified using chemical treatments to eliminate impurities, enhancing its suitability for high-quality steel production
typeuses.zincrefined: Produced in a kiln, fired from concentrated ore to create a perfect alloy material
typeuses.goldrefined: Obtained by thermal processing of concentrated ore, yielding pure gold for use in jewelry and high-value industrial applications
typeuses.tinrefined: Produced by heating concentrated ore, creating a high-quality metal ideal for alloying and industrial uses
typeuses.copperrefined: Result of intense thermal treatment of concentrated ore, offering high conductivity and durability for electrical and industrial applications
typeuses.leadrefined: Obtained through kiln processing, suitable for everything from bullets to battery production
typeuses.ironrefined: Created by high-temperature treatment of concentrated ore, essential for construction and manufacturing due to its strength and versatility
typeuses.ilmenite: A titanium-rich mineral obtained as a byproduct of iron ore processing, valuable for the production of titanium dioxide
typeuses.titan: Legendary metal produced from ilmenite through advanced metallurgical processes, known for its strength, light weight, and corrosion resistance
typeuses.diamond: A real diamond in the rough. Sturdy, beautiful, precious
typeuses.steelbeam: Manufactured for construction and structural engineering, offering exceptional strength and durability
typeuses.concrete: A durable building material for modern construction projects
typeuses.complexmachine: Complicated mechanical component, essential for advanced systems, ensuring efficient power transfer and machine operation
typeuses.chestbuilding: A collection of essential materials for any serious construction work
typeuses.steeldrill: Durable drill designed for mining and industrial applications, providing reliable performance and efficiency
typeuses.titandrill: Titanium-coated drill offering enhanced durability and performance, suitable for tough mining conditions
typeuses.diamonddrill: Diamond-coated drill providing superior cutting capabilities and longevity, ideal for precision mining and industrial tasks
typeuses.sophisticatedmachinery: Advanced machinery tools for complex industrial processes, ensuring high precision and efficiency in manufacturing
typeuses.machinetools: Basic machinery tools, fundamental for essential manufacturing tasks and operations
typeuses.precisionmachinery: High-precision machinery, crucial for fast, intricate and detailed manufacturing processes
typeuses.medievalkit: True old-school way of doing your research
typeuses.eyeglasses: Really inspirational and clever tools to boost your creativity and help with complicated calculations. A must-have for people of culture
typeuses.industrialkit: Professional scientific tools for advanced research and development, required for cutting-edge scientific endeavors
typeuses.advsmelter: Factory-scale station for efficient metal refining, utilizing high-temperature processes for superior results and enormous quantities
typeuses.advsmith: Advanced metalworks for high-quality production, employing modern metallurgical techniques
typeuses.beneficiationtank: Enormous tank for ore beneficiation, using flotation, leaching, and chemical processing to purify large amounts of materials
typeuses.advminer: Still using pickaxes? Damn, that's so last century! Be careful, it's really loud
typeuses.titanlockbox: Bank-grade security vault for storing your precious items
typeuses.arcfurnace: Uses extremely high voltages to melt and weld certain materials
typeuses.boiler: Uses high temperatures to boil water into steam to spin a turbine and make power
typeuses.batterycasing: You want to use electricity? What about finding a place to store it first, that's what this is for
typeuses.batteryempty: An empty battery ready to be filled with electricity
typeuses.batteryfull: A battery full of electric charge, ready to power advanced machinery
typeuses.handcrank: A primitive handcrank that generates small amounts of power
typeuses.copperwire: Thin strands of copper woven tightly together to safely conduct electricity
typeuses.refinedironanvil: A more durable and tough anvil made for forging modern tools

advsmelter.description: Unlocks the new smelter station, allowing efficient large-scale refining processes of Copper, Lead and Bronze
advsmelter.name: Factory Grade Smelting

sawmill.description: Unlocks the sawmill, providing advanced speed and volume for processing logs
sawmill.name: Factory Grade Sawmill

steam_power.description: Unlocks the Steam Engine, allowing for greater production of electricity
steam_power.name: Steam Power

benefication.description: Unlocks leaching and chemical processing, more advanced beneficiation techniques that allows mass production of Gold, Iron, Steel and Brass
benefication.name: Ore Beneficiation

advminer.description: Unlocks the mining drills, enabling the use of industrial-grade drills for more efficient and powerful mining operations
advminer.name: Drill Mining

advsmith.description: Unlocks the station for fast and efficient production of what your poor smith was doing all by himself. Replace an old anvil with advanced machinery and truly modern metallurgical techniques
advsmith.name: Factory Grade Metalworks

titancoating.description: Unlocks the ability to produce titan ingots. Use them to coat tools and equipment, enhancing their durability and performance
titancoating.name: Titan Coating

complexrefining.description: Unlocks a new way to get precious ilmenite and diamonds, giving you a predictable income of these valuable materials
complexrefining.name: Complex Ore Refining

diamondcoating.description: Unlocks the technology to apply diamond coatings to tools, providing superior cutting capabilities and longevity. This means the most advanced machinery tools!
diamondcoating.name: Diamond Coating

advconstruction.description: Unlocks concrete and steel beams. Grey is a new black
advconstruction.name: Modern Construction Materials
